creator: kbyanc@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Thanks, but the attached patch is hard-wired for python-2.0 without 
explicitely depending on it. Additionally, it does not bring py-coro 
completely up-to-date (the latest version is available from 
http://www.dotfunk.com/projects/coro/ 
However, I have had great difficulty trying to get the latest version 
to build in the ports framework. If you can get it to work, please 
let me know and I'll update the port, otherwise, I plan to kill 
the py-coro port altogether.
